title: Savory Molten Vietnamese Tofu Bun Cha
description: A flavorful and adventurous Vietnamese dish featuring marinated tofu, coriander seeds, and a molten umami sauce, served with bun cha noodles.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine coriander seeds, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and maple syrup to make the marinade.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the onions until they are lightly charred.
Cook the bun cha noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and add the marinated tofu.
Cook the tofu until it is golden brown and crispy on the outside.
To assemble the dish, place the cooked noodles in a bowl, top with the tofu, grilled onions, scallions, and sesame seeds.
Drizzle the remaining marinade over the top and serve immediately.
